ID: US-OLV-118
Title: Backfill user stories
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-23
Milestone: Add module chat flows and story backfill docs

As a product owner
I want backdated user stories in the repository
So that history can later be audited and squashed against product intent

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Stories are stored under .github/user-stories/oliver-app.
- [ ] Each story has sequential US-OLV IDs.
- [ ] Each story includes status, verified flag, backdated date, milestone, narrative, criteria, and notes.
- [ ] The index table lists every generated story.

Notes: This story describes the backfill artifact itself.
